name: Personal Finance Owner
role: Sole owner and decision-maker for household finances
goals: When reviewing or planning personal spending, I want one trustworthy view across all owned bank accounts so I can make budget decisions from complete actuals and delegate ledger maintenance safely to an AI agent.
pain_points: Transactions are fragmented across three accounts at two banks; descriptions and categories are inconsistent; manual consolidation is delayed and transfer or duplicate errors are hard to detect.
workaround: Inspect separate bank statements, manually consolidate selected transactions, infer categories, remove transfers or duplicates, and recalculate totals for each reporting period.
success: The owner can delegate daily ledger maintenance and retrieve totals whose included transactions, category decisions, transfers, and correction history are inspectable and reconcile exactly.
